raw_input.title: Senior Security Engineer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Senior Security Engineer, Development Security and Operations. Build security engineering layer behind application delivery and cloud infrastructure. Application security, anti-bot, anti-fraud, account abuse, security controls, tools, remediation, auditability, DevSecOps.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with cloud/API experience. No core security, cybersecurity, AppSec, or DevSecOps trajectory.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: security/DevSecOps is adjacent but not plug-and-play. APPLY_NOW is too aggressive.
